description_long: This house complex consists of multiple interconnected white structures surrounded by dense greenery, including trees and shrubs, forming a natural perimeter. The buildings are single-story with flat roofs, featuring several outdoor patios and wooden deck areas. Large windows and glass doors are visible, allowing for ample natural light and a modern, open feel. The layout is irregular, with the buildings arranged in a loose, organic cluster rather than a strict grid. There are visible driveways and walkways, as well as a few outdoor amenities such as seating areas and possibly a small pool or water feature. The overall design is contemporary, blending clean lines with natural landscaping for a harmonious residential environment.
description: A modern, single-story house complex with flat roofs, white facades, and extensive surrounding greenery, featuring patios and large windows.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house complex from above, highlighting the dense tree border and the irregular arrangement of the white buildings with visible patios.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a perspective where the main entryways and some driveways are visible, along with the clustered layout and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: View 2 emphasizes the full extent of the tree perimeter and the spread of the buildings, with clear sight of the patios and connecting walkways.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a look at the rear sides of the buildings, showing more of the private outdoor areas and the continuity of the tree border.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small steps or porches, and are accentuated by wooden decks and minimal overhangs.
